_comment: Imported from ansys/ansys-pyetk (Apache-2.0) snapshot @ abb9fb22bdf7. 146 cores converted via scripts/import_pyetk_catalog.py. Geometry parameters are shape-specific approximations (±15 %); verify against vendor datasheet before final design.
